description: Execute V0.7-M1 by defining the core multi-agent protocol boundaries, scenarios (Personal/Team), and heterogenous environment mapping without writing executable code or moving framework files.
scope: Generate two markdown design documents: tasks/v0.7-m1-protocol-reframing.md (defining Executor, Reviewer, Gatekeeper, Coordinator roles and the minimal mandatory core vs adapter layers) and tasks/v0.7-m1-scenario-modeling.md (defining Personal Mode and Team Mode workflows).
out_of_scope: Strictly NO MCP server logic implementation, NO workflow state mutations, NO physical relocation to .agent-state/, and NO modification of existing V0.6 docs or protocol files.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to write implementation code in src/.
Executing without an approved M1 contract.
